chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.1216 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR FURTHER ORDER IN VIEW OF ORDER DATED 04.9.2025 23.9.2025 Applicant Faizan Ahmed Chishti is present Mr. Abdul Hameed, advocate for complainant Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G. Sindh a/w PI Abdul Rashid PS Sohrab Goth ------------------------------------------ Applicant/ accused is present and submits Order dated 12.8.2025, whereby parties have patched up and applicant was acquitted by the trial Court. Certified copy of such order is taken on record. On the other hand, counsel for complainant concedes and states that the matter has been compromised. Accordingly, this Cr. Bail Application has become infructuous stands dismissed. JUDGE asim/PA
